note: The operator decision queues. The four queues are the SYSTEM's taxonomy; the operator's surface is ONE merged stream ordered by priority (the panel's 'Your turn' view). Every item carries: priority (0-100), form (how input is gathered: tap | digit | burst | interview), ask (the one line of what is needed). Peel from the top.
priority_model: engagement momentum (what the operator is mid-flow on) > one-tap quick wins > direction unblocks > taste passes > design nits. Rescored on every operator return.

taste_review.label: Taste review
taste_review.desc: Shipped + preview-ready work awaiting the operator's feel pass.

items.ask: Calluses is IN THE APP (v136) - open the Library, play YOUR song over its own progressions, burst on what the fingers say
items.title: Play 'Calluses' - first operator-authored catalog song

items.ask: G5+G6 live (v139): open a Studio, tap scale chips - the 'Why ... works' banner follows your chip; reopen the track and your choice is remembered. Burst on the per-scale copy
items.title: Whynote-per-scale copy + scale memory feel pass

items.ask: Play the beginner journey once (cue -> Solo -> modal -> Studio tip) and the C-F-Bb spelling - one open of the live app covers both
items.title: G1+G2 beginner journey + key-aware spelling feel pass

items.ask: Folds into TR-1's app open - only stays listed until you confirm Bb/Eb read right on YOUR progressions
items.title: Key-aware spelling on your real progressions

planning_approval.label: Planning approval
planning_approval.desc: Go/no-go and re-rank decisions. One digit or one word each.

design_review.label: Design review
design_review.desc: Design calls parked for operator eyes when the SME bench + recorded taste could not resolve alone.

interview.label: Interview
interview.desc: Open question sets. Answering ANY subset unblocks - the rest become cited assumed answers.

items.ask: 30-min sitting when you want the M3 songs/tracks merge to go launch-ready - batchable with IV-2
items.title: S2 (M3 songs/tracks full merge) spec-formalize

items.ask: Should the key picker offer Bb/Eb/Ab as first-class FLAT keys? yes / no / show me a mock
items.title: Key picker flat names (FORK-4 wave 2 residue)

retired.resolution: Q1 ANSWERED 'delivery' (operator digit, 2026-07-10) - delivery/PM is the first cockpit department. Q2-Q5 folded as cited assumed answers per the any-subset interview contract.
ANSWERED 'y' (operator, 2026-07-10) - goalpost board resumed. G5 S-WHYNOTE-SCALE + G6 S-SCALE-MEMORY dispatched to a worktree agent same turn.
